---
title: "Introduction to Zotero"
id: material-introduction-4
summary: "Zotero Quick Start (3 videos, 15 minutes)"


modules:
  - module-introduction
Goals:
  - module-goals
activities: []
assessments:
  - assessment
labels:
  - basic
  - recommended
  - youtube
published: true

---

## Watch the videos:

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/hmRkwi9rs38?si=KUnrVH0DnTAtggNi" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/videoseries?si=s37tBleu9iEZ3A9R&amp;list=PLTU8eFl06Wq3du3lgStlHyqW1U90NFzmq" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/y2sXLQR-IAs?si=W1l2oKLS2oIvOIg_" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/xupeuj786BI?si=0WDvsNMdghkD5sOH" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>


[Zotero Quick Start](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLTU8eFl06Wq3du3lgStlHyqW1U90NFzmq)

---

[**Module:** UAV based remote Sensing - A Brief Overview](../modules/module-introduction.qmd)
